name: ExtensionRelatedArtifact_PublicationDate
title: R5: Date of publication of the artifact being referred to (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `RelatedArtifact.publicationDate` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`RelatedArtifact.publicationDate` 0..1 `date`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `RelatedArtifact.publicationDate` 0..1 `date`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `RelatedArtifact.publicationDate` has a context of RelatedArtifact based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `RelatedArtifact`.
Element `RelatedArtifact.publicationDate` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
